title: 5 Traditional Gifts for a Festive Diwali
description: The article provides a list of traditional gifts for Diwali, including diyas, sweets, rangoli, clothing, and gold or silver jewelry or coins. These gifts symbolize the victory of light over darkness, the sweetness of life, good luck and prosperity, and wealth and prosperity.
